deposit_type_code.text: ประเภทเงินฝาก

root.sql: SELECT sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_group_code, sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_type_code, --(select last_close_day from sc_dep_m_constant ) as working_day , (select current_date ) as working_day , sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_name, ( SELECT count( distinct sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no ) FROM sc_dep_m_creditor, sc_dep_m_rule WHERE ( sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_type_code = sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code ) and ( ( sc_dep_m_creditor.close_status is NULL ) OR ( sc_dep_m_creditor.close_status <> 'C' ) ) and sc_dep_m_rule.insure_status = '0' ) as count_memno, sum(sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_balance) as c_balance, count(sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no) as c_countacc, count( distinct sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no ) as c_memno, sum(sc_dep_m_creditor.withdrawable_amount) as c_withdrawable, sum(sc_dep_m_creditor.cheque_pending_amount) as c_cheque_pending, sum( sc_dep_m_creditor.loan_holding_amount ) as c_loan_holding, sum( sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_standsecurity_amount ) as c_standsecurity FROM sc_dep_m_creditor, sc_dep_m_rule WHERE ( sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_type_code = sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code ) and ( ( sc_dep_m_creditor.close_status is NULL ) OR ( sc_dep_m_creditor.close_status <> 'C' ) AND ( sc_dep_m_rule.insure_status = '0' ) ) and sc_dep_m_rule.invest_status = '1' /*WHERE*/ GROUP BY sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_group_code, sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_type_code, sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_name ORDER BY sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_group_code ASC, sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_type_code ASC
